title: Power exposes exactly three fixed semantic ATX actions

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
The ATX extension is active, serial readiness is proven, and the safe power baseline is recorded.

The harness records lifecycle state through structured establish, retire, connect-result, and reconnect-result fixtures; every input call consumes a separately captured fresh observation from the exact current successor generation.

fault_script.action: Drive each applicable mutation through its definitive acknowledgement boundary; before every ATX call, execute the fixture proof for the recorded baseline, active atx-power extension, serial readiness, and current Browser-owned binding.
fault_script.expected_effect: Every linked mutation returns applied with the exact acknowledgement and verification strength; press_power, hold_power, and press_reset use exact 200 ms, 5000 ms, and 200 ms sequencing with restoration and renewed readiness proof between cases.

steps.expect: The structured fixture establishes opaque-session generation 7 as the sole ready lifecycle session for the three ATX semantic cases.
The recorded ATX-observable baseline, active atx-power extension, serial readiness, and current Browser-owned binding are proven immediately before press_power.
power-short uses exactly 200 ms and returns a correlated serial receipt.
After press_power, the fixture restores the recorded ATX-observable baseline and re-proves the active extension, serial readiness, baseline, and current binding before hold_power.
power-long holds for exactly 5000 ms and returns a correlated serial receipt within the bounded 10000 ms deadline.

After the exact 5000 ms hold completes within its 10000 ms tool deadline, the fixture restores the recorded ATX-observable baseline and re-proves the active extension, serial readiness, baseline, and current binding before press_reset.
reset uses exactly 200 ms and returns a correlated serial receipt.
After press_reset, the fixture restores the recorded ATX-observable baseline and re-proves the active extension, serial readiness, baseline, and current binding.
After final generation-7 ATX baseline restoration and reproof, the fixture retires the session and structurally proves no incumbent before takeover:false connect.
applied/device_ack_only for jetkvm_session_connect, publishing opaque-definitive-acknowledgement-session generation 8 with its exact acknowledgement and verification strength.
The structured connect result binds the exact returned session identity and generation for the next reconnect call.
applied/device_ack_only for jetkvm_session_reconnect, replacing generation 8 with opaque-definitive-acknowledgement-session generation 9 and fresh_capture_required true.
The structured reconnect result binds the exact returned successor identity and generation and requires new observations.
A fresh generation-9 observation reserved as opaque-observation-definitive-acknowledgement-input-keyboard.
applied for jetkvm_input_keyboard with its exact acknowledgement and verification strength.
A distinct fresh generation-9 observation reserved as opaque-observation-definitive-acknowledgement-input-mouse.
applied for jetkvm_input_mouse with its exact acknowledgement and verification strength.
A distinct fresh generation-9 observation reserved as opaque-observation-definitive-acknowledgement-input-paste.
applied for jetkvm_input_paste with its exact acknowledgement and verification strength.
applied for jetkvm_input_release with its exact acknowledgement and verification strength.
The restored ATX-observable baseline, active extension, serial readiness, and current binding remain proven immediately before the matrix definitive-acknowledgement power call.
applied for jetkvm_power_control with its exact acknowledgement and verification strength.
After the final matrix power acknowledgement, restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline and re-prove the active extension, serial readiness, baseline, and exact current binding.

pass.assertion: Every linked mutation uses an explicitly derived lifecycle state: connect runs only after no-incumbent proof, reconnect consumes the exact returned connect identity and generation, and later calls use the returned successor with fresh observations before inputs; each correlated acknowledgement remains applied with its exact verification strength.

The ordered press_power, hold_power, and press_reset cases each start only after the recorded ATX baseline, active extension, serial readiness, and current binding are proven; the harness restores and re-proves those facts after every case, exact timings remain 200 ms, 5000 ms, and 200 ms, and no fourth action, caller-supplied duration, delay, repeat, pin, level, GPIO operation, or arbitrary sequence is accepted.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.
The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

restore.action: Restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline using the reviewed fixture procedure while retaining the device lease.
restore.assertion: The baseline ATX-observable state is proven before the next story starts.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
